runners.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Big Zeal at Q Parklands last start over 520m (30.37). Made up good ground from the back and will be strong late again. Has to be included.

runners.formComment: Finished third last start (20.14) at big odds over 366m at Capalaba. Drawn close to the inside. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (20.14) at big odds over 366m at Capalaba. Drawn close to the inside. Looks to have the job ahead.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on April 12 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Bentley Kristoff beaten 9 lengths (30.37). Had been in strong form, hitting the frame two times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on April 12 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Bentley Kristoff beaten 9 lengths (30.37). Had been in strong form, hitting the frame two times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

runners.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing seventh (28.71) at this track last start. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing seventh (28.71) at this track last start. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.

runners.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (28.21) at this track over 484m. More than capable and has to be included.

runners.formComment: Had been in solid form before missing the frame at the latest appearance when sixth (30.45) at Q Parklands. Has to overcome a wide draw and prefer each-way.
